stemHtml: For a Class A aircraft the net take-off flight path is subdivided into various segments. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The 3rd segment is completed at the normal flap retraction height and is flown at max continuous thrust
options.b: The second segment is flown at V<sub>3</sub> up to a height of 400ft (Flap retraction height)
options.c: The first segment starts at the end of TODA where the aircraft should be at 50ft and V<sub>2</sub>. This segment is flown at V<sub>2</sub> whilst the landing gear is retracted
options.d: The final segment starts at the end of segment 3 with the aircraft in a clean configuration, at the final segment climb speed with maximum continuous power set, ending at 1500ft or higher if there are distant obstacles to clear
